backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining diagram and user profile data types, storage, and CRUD operations for diagrams (save, load, list, delete) and user profiles, with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (canvas workspace, freehand drawing, icon library, PNG export, theming, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key details of each component, page, hook, utility, and configuration file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, including colors for background, foreground, sidebar, charts, and UI primitives.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app titled 'Threat Hunting Portal', mounting the React root and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/index.ts: Utility snippet demonstrating html2canvas usage to capture a canvas element and export it as a PNG data URL.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for report list, create, detail, attack path, and canvas studio pages, guarded by Internet Identity authentication and a profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathCanvas: Interactive canvas component for the attack path diagram editor, handling icon drag-and-drop, freehand drawing, line/box/connection drawing, and rendering all canvas elements (icons, connections, drawings, images, text labels, box shapes) via SVG and DOM overlays.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathConnec: Renders an SVG arrow connector between two points with support for rotation, dotted style, selection state, and click handling. Includes an invisible wider hit area for easier interaction.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathIcon.t: Renders a named attack-path icon as an image element, mapping icon type strings to asset file paths. Supports configurable size and CSS class.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathToolba: Sidebar toolbar for the attack path editor providing tool selection buttons, color/stroke controls, undo/clear actions, image upload, and a draggable icon palette.
frontend/src/components/canvas/CanvasToo: A vertical toolbar component for the canvas editor providing tool selection (select, draw, shapes, text, image), color and stroke controls, undo, and PNG export actions.
frontend/src/components/canvas/CanvasWor: An SVG-based interactive canvas workspace that handles freehand drawing, shape creation, text editing, and drag/resize/selection of elements with keyboard shortcut support.
frontend/src/components/canvas/IconLibra: A React panel component that displays a searchable, categorized icon library grid, allowing users to select icons by name or category via tabs and a search input.
frontend/src/components/DiagramSidebar.t: Displays a scrollable list of saved diagrams with metadata (icon count, connections, last modified) and supports loading or deleting diagrams via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Top-level page layout providing a sticky header with navigation links, an optional hero banner on the home page, and a footer; renders children in a full-width or contained main area depending on the route.
frontend/src/components/LoadDiagramDialo: Modal dialog that lists all saved diagrams and allows the user to load or delete one, with a nested confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Renders a logout button when the user is authenticated via Internet Identity, clearing the identity and React Query cache on click.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Renders a login page for the Threat Hunt Portal that uses Internet Identity authentication, showing a loading state while authenticating.
frontend/src/components/MitreTechniqueSe: A searchable combobox component for selecting MITRE ATT&CK techniques from a predefined dataset, with support for adding custom technique entries as badges.
frontend/src/components/PdfGeneratorButt: A button component that triggers PDF generation for a given report using a utility function, showing a spinner during generation and toast notifications for success or failure.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name to complete profile setup, saving the profile via a mutation hook and blocking dismissal until submitted.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: A comprehensive form component for creating threat hunt reports, collecting fields such as title, author, MITRE techniques, IOCs, findings, and remediation details before submitting.
frontend/src/components/SaveDiagramDialo: A dialog component that prompts the user to enter a name before saving an attack path diagram, with cancel and save actions.
frontend/src/data/iconLibrary.ts: Defines the IconEntry type and ICON_LIBRARY array containing categorized icon metadata (id, name, category, path) for network, security, users, files, system, and communication icons.
frontend/src/data/mitreAttackData.ts: Exports a typed array of MITRE ATT&CK techniques with id, name, and description fields covering tactics such as Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, and Privilege Escalation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttackPathState.ts: A React hook managing the full mutable state of an attack-path canvas (icons, connections, drawings, lines, text labels, images, box shapes) with undo history support.
frontend/src/hooks/useCanvasState.ts: A React hook managing canvas state for freehand paths, shapes, text labels, and icons with position/resize tracking and a capped undo history.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteDiagramState: A React Query mutation hook that deletes a diagram by ID via the backend actor and invalidates the allDiagrams query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllDiagrams.ts: A React Query hook that fetches all saved diagrams from the backend actor, enabled only when the actor is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: A React Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend, exposing combined loading state that accounts for actor initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetDiagramState.ts: React Query hook that fetches a single diagram state by ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing login/logout state via DFINITY's AuthClient with a React context provider.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for report CRUD operations; all backend calls are stubbed out as the report functionality has been removed from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the current user's profile via the backend actor and invalidates the cached profile query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveDiagramState.t: React Query mutation hook that saves a named diagram state to the backend and invalidates related diagram queries on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the design system including canvas studio tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AttackPathPage.tsx: Page component for an attack path diagramming tool, providing a canvas with toolbar, sidebar, and save/load dialog functionality backed by the diagram state hooks.
frontend/src/pages/CanvasStudioPage.tsx: Page component for a general-purpose canvas studio with drawing tools, shape/icon support, and PNG export functionality.
frontend/src/pages/CreateReportPage.tsx: Page component that renders a threat hunt report creation form and attempts to save it via the (currently non-functional) saveReport mutation.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Displays a detailed view of a single threat hunting report fetched by ID, showing sections like executive summary, timeline, attack vector, evidence, and MITRE techniques, with a PDF download button.
frontend/src/pages/ReportListPage.tsx: Renders a paginated table of all threat hunting reports with actions to view, download as PDF, or delete each report, using query hooks for data fetching and mutation.
frontend/src/types/html2canvas.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file intended for html2canvas type definitions.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file intended for jsPDF type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/canvasExport.ts: Exports an SVG element found inside a given HTML container to a PNG file by serializing the SVG, rendering it onto a canvas, and triggering a download.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates a printable HTML document from a DetailedReport object and opens it in a new window for PDF printing, including styled sections for metadata, MITRE techniques, IOCs, and threat actors.
frontend/src/utils/shapeRenderer.tsx: Provides a drawShape function that renders various SVG shapes (rectangle, circle, triangle, line, arrow, star, diamond, hexagon) from a CanvasShape object.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens (including canvas studio design tokens), extended border radius, font families, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite build configuration for a React frontend targeting an ICP/DFX environment, with path aliasing, canister/DFX environment variable injection, a dev proxy to the local replica, and global polyfill for Node compatibility.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking schema version, existing implemented features, and pending new feature requests for a canvas drawing application with freehand drawing, shapes, text, drag-and-drop, icon library, and PNG export.
